input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>Two sandwich halves dusted with powdered sugar rest on a plate with red jam. Melted cheese and ham are visible within the fried bread. The food and plate remain stationary during this color shift.</think><answer></answer>

This stationary slice is positioned near an open jar of white spread labeled "MAXI" and a yellow mustard bottle. In the background, a green plate holding additional slices of ham, pale meat, and cheese with holes is visible, along with a white bowl containing a single white egg. A stainless steel sink is partially visible in the top right corner. The hand maintains pressure on the meat stack, securing the layers on the bottom slice of bread while the top slice waits nearby.

queries.question: What entities are present and what are they doing?

answers.text: A person in a dark sleeve prepares a sandwich on a beige countertop. They lift a slice of white bread, coat it with white mayonnaise from a Kraft jar, and place it back down. Another slice is coated with yellow mustard. Nearby, a green plate holds slices of pink ham and white cheese, while a yellow mustard bottle and other condiments remain stationary. Finally, two golden-brown sandwich halves dusted with powdered sugar are shown resting on a white plate.

[6-12] A person wearing a dark blue long-sleeved shirt reaches into the frame. Their hand grips the green mayo lid while a silver knife is positioned near the mustard bottle. The sandwich is pressed and maneuvered within the bowl to thoroughly coat the bread surface while the bowl is held above the oiled pan.

[170-172] A hand in a dark sleeve holds a white bowl containing yellow liquid over a black cast iron skillet. The hand presses a white bread sandwich into the mixture to coat it thoroughly above the shiny, oiled pan. [172-174] The hand holds the white bowl centrally over the black skillet on the white stovetop; the bright interior contrasts with the dark pan, and the sandwich is no longer visible. [174-176] A hand in a dark blue sleeve places the yellow, egg-washed sandwich into the skillet, landing it on the shiny surface near the red handle. [176-178] The hand presses down on the top slice of white bread, flattening the sandwich slightly against the oiled pan surface.

[178-186] A hand clad in a dark blue sleeve engages with a sandwich frying in a black cast iron skillet equipped with a red handle, positioned on a white stovetop beside a black electric coil burner. Initially, the fingers press down to flatten the top slice of white bread against the hot, oiled surface. The hand subsequently withdraws, leaving the sandwich, which consists of white bread slices with visible fillings, centered on the shiny, oiled pan. The hand then reaches into the frame from the right side to touch the top slice before pressing firmly once more. This action slightly flattens the bread to ensure even contact with the skillet near the red handle, while the white stovetop and adjacent burner remain stationary in the background. Throughout the sequence, the oil glistens on the black surface of the pan around the cooking sandwich as it fries.

[186-188] A hand in a dark blue sleeve lifts away from the sandwich, ceasing the pressing action. The sandwich remains sizzling in the center of the black skillet on the white stovetop. [188-190] The golden-brown sandwich continues to fry undisturbed in the black cast iron skillet with a red handle, its toasted surface facing upward. [190-194] A hand wearing a dark sleeve enters from the bottom right holding a silver metal spatula. The utensil slides under the golden-brown bread, lifting it slightly from the oiled surface to prepare for flipping on the white stovetop.

[200-202] A white square plate is held over the black skillet. The golden-brown sandwich is moved from the pan onto the plate. The hand holds the plate steady, displaying the toasted bread and melted filling against the white ceramic surface near the stovetop.

queries.question: What entities are present and what are they doing?

answers.text: A person in a dark sleeve prepares a sandwich on a beige countertop. They lift a slice of white bread, coat it with white mayonnaise from a Kraft jar, and place it back down. Another slice is coated with yellow mustard. Nearby, a green plate holds slices of pink ham and white cheese, while a yellow mustard bottle and other condiments remain stationary. Finally, two golden-brown sandwich halves dusted with powdered sugar are shown resting on a white plate.
